notes: Native English pages were created for United States SEO discovery.
English URLs keep English as default; manual ES/EN selector remains available.
Spanish pages received hreflang links to English counterparts.
Sitemap, llms.txt, llms-full.txt and goatify-entity.jsonld were updated.
Only one ES/EN selector remains visible; the old header switch stays hidden to avoid duplication.
